evals.prompt: I want free dofollow backlinks from startup directories. Is Super Launch good for that?
evals.expected_output: Explains that Super Launch free tier gives nofollow backlinks, not dofollow. Recommends SoloPush and ProductBurst for free dofollow backlinks instead.

assertions.name: free_nofollow
assertions.description: States that Super Launch free submissions get nofollow backlinks, not dofollow

assertions.name: dr_mention
assertions.description: Mentions Super Launch has DR59 but dofollow is only available for paid listings

assertions.name: free_alternatives
assertions.description: Recommends alternative directories with free dofollow backlinks like SoloPush or ProductBurst

evals.prompt: What's the difference between Super Launch and Open Launch? Which is better for backlinks?
evals.expected_output: Compares: Open Launch DR65 dofollow ($12 guaranteed), Super Launch DR59 dofollow only for paid ($49/mo). Open Launch is better value for backlinks.

assertions.name: dr_comparison
assertions.description: Compares DR values: Super Launch DR59 vs Open Launch DR65

assertions.name: pricing_comparison
assertions.description: Notes Open Launch offers a one-time $12 payment vs Super Launch's $49/month recurring ad cost

assertions.name: backlink_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends Open Launch as better value for dofollow backlinks

evals.prompt: How does Super Launch's 7-day front page work? What happens after?
evals.expected_output: Explains every product gets guaranteed 7 days on the front page with no editorial queue, then rotates off but stays in the directory and can appear on the Top 50 Leaderboard.

assertions.name: seven_day_guarantee
assertions.description: States every product gets 7 days on the front page, guaranteed

assertions.name: post_rotation
assertions.description: Explains product moves off the front page after 7 days but remains in the directory

assertions.name: leaderboard
assertions.description: Mentions the Top 50 Leaderboard as a way to maintain visibility after the 7-day window
